ham.subject: Semester Project Submission Reminder – Due Date Approaching
ham.body:
Hello Everyone,

This is a reminder that the semester project for the Advanced Algorithms course is due on Friday, 12 June 2026. Please submit your final report via the course portal by 5:00 PM. Late submissions will incur a 10% penalty.

If you have any questions, feel free to reach out.

Best regards,
Dr. Emily Carter

spam.subject: URGENT: Your Crypto Wallet Has Been Suspended – Immediate Action Required
spam.body:
Dear Valued User,

We regret to inform you that your crypto wallet (ID: 12345678) has been suspended due to suspicious activity. To restore access, please verify your account within 24 hours. Failure to comply may result in permanent lockout and potential loss of funds.

Click <URL> to verify your account now.

Thank you,
Security Team
